Nvidia-backed CoreWeave aims for a $4 billion IPO, with a valuation over $35 billion. CoreWeave plans to file for a U.S. listing within a week, setting up a highly anticipated debut. The company transitioned from cryptocurrency mining to AI in 2019.
news.summary: CoreWeave, a cloud computing company supported by Nvidia Corp (NASDAQ: NVDA), is quickly moving towards an IPO, with plans to raise $4 billion at a valuation exceeding $35 billion. According to Bloomberg, CoreWeave could submit for a U.S. listing in the upcoming week, making it one of the most anticipated debuts of the year. Formerly focused on cryptocurrency mining, CoreWeave shifted to AI in 2019, and has thrived in this sector ever since. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: LASÉRIE introduces first AI-powered med spa experience in the US with SmartSKN, setting new skincare standard.
news.summary: EDINA, Minnesota - LASÉRIE is leading the way in skincare innovation as it becomes the first med spa in the United States to introduce SmartSKN's AI-Powered robotics lab. This groundbreaking move is set to revolutionize professional skincare standards. The development was announced on February 28, 2025, marking a significant milestone in the industry.

news.headline: American Hardwood Information Center provides free American Hardwoods Collection for architects and designers.Pittsburgh, Feb 28, 2025 - Resource includes sample kit and brochure on renewable materials.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on February 28, 2025, the American Hardwood Information Center announced the availability of the American Hardwoods Collection for architects and interior designers at no charge. This resource includes a sample kit and brochure providing extensive details on the abundant and renewable nature of American hardwoods.

news.headline: DLC pack on March 27, 2025, with 10+ scenario maps for single-player challenges. Released by Plymouth-based company.
news.summary: An upcoming downloadable content pack for the highly praised strategy game introduces over 10 scenario maps, offering objective-based gameplay for distinctive single-player challenges. Set to be released on February 28, 2025, the enhanced version of Sins of a Solar Empire II aims to elevate the gaming experience for players.

Bushel enhances platform with financial tools for farmers/agribusinesses, offering 3.43% interest rates as of Feb 26, 2025.
news.summary: A digital payments and workflow solutions company, Bushel, based in Fargo, N.D., is broadening its platform by introducing improved financial tools specially designed for farmers and agribusinesses. The expansion will include the introduction of Bushel business accounts*, provided through The Bancorp Bank, N.A. Farmers and agribusinesses will have access to these business accounts, with competitive interest rates currently standing at 3.43% as of Feb 26, 2025. The Bancorp is a fully owned subsidiary of The Bancorp, Inc. and is a Member FDIC.

news.headline: Crypto market sees Bitcoin drop by 25% from peak, worsening overall downturn.
BTC surged to $84K as analysts see recent crash as buying opportunity. Regulatory, nation-state exposure, onchain data and TradFi show strong fundamentals.
news.summary: Recent regulatory changes, exposure to nation-states, onchain information, and integration with traditional finance demonstrate that the core strength of Bitcoin (BTC) remained intact during the recent market downturn. This resilience is evidenced by key indicators and data, highlighting the cryptocurrency's stability and robustness.

news.headline: EverCommerce Inc. to present at Citizens JMP Tech Conference on Feb. 28, 2025. (NASDAQ: EVCM) #InvestorConferences.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, EverCommerce Inc. (NASDAQ: EVCM), a prominent service commerce platform, shared that they are scheduled to present at forthcoming investor conferences.

news.headline: IPO market downturn continues as unicorns increase, but optimism for more IPOs in 2025. Investors hopeful for tech boom.
news.summary: Following a challenging year, investors are hopeful for a stronger technology IPO market in 2025, aiming to encourage more unicorns to go public. The previous year saw a slump in the IPO market, with an increasing number of unicorns yet to enter. This optimism for increased IPO activity comes as investors look to revitalize the tech sector.

news.headline: Stock market sees sharp losses: Nasdaq down for the week; Nvidia, Tesla dive, Nutanix jumps. Dow Jones stable.(Character count: 105)
news.summary: In the latest market update, the Nasdaq experienced a notable decline over the week, struggling to maintain crucial support levels, while the Dow Jones remained relatively stable. The stock market saw significant losses, with Nvidia and Tesla shares plummeting, in contrast to Nutanix stocks which surged. This weekly review indicates a challenging period for investors, as demonstrated by the fluctuations in key indices.

news.headline: Pembina Pipeline Corp files 2024 year-end disclosure documents including financial statements, management analysis.
news.summary: Pembina Pipeline Corporation has submitted its audited financial statements for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024, along with management's discussion and analysis, and annual information form to Canadian securities regulators. In addition, the company has filed its Form 40-F with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for the same period. Pembina is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol PPL and on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol PBA.

news.headline: Canoga Perkins introduces Private 5G with TSN demo for industrial use, integrating Moso Canopy 5GID2 radio and switch.
news.summary: Canoga Perkins, a network connectivity solutions provider, has unveiled a demonstration of its Private 5G with Time-Sensitive Networking (TSN) at the Customer Experience Center in Chatsworth, Calif. The demonstration showcases a model for deploying Private 5G, emphasizing a streamlined, reliable, and secure approach tailored for industrial and enterprise applications. The setup includes the Moso Canopy 5GID2 radio and Canoga Perkins’ switch and transport solution, Sync, offering an integrated solution for optimal performance.

Century Aluminum stock surges after analyst upgrade and smelter restart potential. Price target raised to $22, trading at 5.6x/5.3x our 2025E/2026E EBITDA. Analyst estimates EBITDA of $450-500 million with a spot valuation under 4.0x.
news.summary: Shares of Century Aluminum Company (NASDAQ:CENX) saw a rise after BMO Capital analyst Katja Jancic revised the stock rating from Market Perform to Outperform. The price target for CENX was kept at $22. According to Jancic, Century's current valuation has become appealing post the recent decline. As per the analyst, CENX shares are trading at 5.6x/5.3x based on 2025E/2026E EBITDA with aluminum/MWP prices at $1.15/lb/$0.30/lb. This suggests an EBITDA range of $450 million to $500 million, indicating a spot valuation below 4.0x. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Zelenksiy leaves White House early after contentious meeting with Trump.
Trump and Zelenskiy press conference is canceled.
ISO/IEC 19790:2025 and ISO/IEC 24759:2025 standards for cryptographic module security have been published, exciting the community.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, the cryptographic module validation community is celebrating the release of the latest updates to the global standards for cryptographic module security and testing. ISO/IEC 19790:2025 and ISO/IEC 24759:2025 mark significant progress in this field. These standards have been eagerly awaited by industry professionals and are considered crucial for ensuring secure cryptographic practices. These updates come after the adoption of ISO/IEC 19790:2012/Cor 1:2015 and ISO/IEC 24759:2017 which served as the foundation for FIPS 140-3 in March 2019. This development signifies a major step forward in bolstering security protocols within the industry.

news.headline: Dr. Bill Winston to host 2025 Business & Leadership Conference in Chicago with 50+ speakers, preceded by Illinois Govt Contracting Summit.
news.summary: In February 2025, the Joseph Business School will be hosting the 2025 Business and Leadership Conference in Chicago. This event will feature over 50 highly esteemed speakers who are recognized globally, participating in main sessions and breakout tracks. Preceding the conference, the 2nd Annual Illinois Government Contracting Summit will take place.

news.headline: Dr. Ryan Saadi of Tevogen Bio named to 2025 NJBIZ Power 100, recognizing influential business leaders in NJ. CEO of Tevogen Bio, a Nasdaq-listed clinical-stage biotech company.
news.summary: In Warren, New Jersey on February 28, 2025, Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: TVGN), a clinical-stage specialty immunotherapy biotech company, shared that its Founder and CEO, Ryan Saadi, MD, MPH, has been selected for the 2025 NJBIZ Power 100 list. This list acknowledges the top figures impacting New Jersey's business environment. NJBIZ's editorial team identifies honorees as key leaders and innovators who propel advancement and reflect the state's varied landscape.

hellocare.ai to implement virtual care at AdventHealth. AdventHealth has over 50 hospital campuses in nine states. #healthtech.
news.summary: In Clearwater, Florida on February 28, 2025, hellocare.ai, a prominent provider of AI-supported virtual healthcare services, revealed its upcoming system-wide integration at AdventHealth. AdventHealth is a connected network comprising over 50 hospital campuses across nine states. This partnership signifies a significant leap in enhancing healthcare delivery through innovative technologies.

news.headline: IllumiCare provides cost-saving insights to healthcare providers via mobile devices, nudging for efficiency.
news.summary: In Birmingham, Alabama, on February 28, 2025, IllumiCare, a prominent company, is known for leading the market in nudging healthcare providers within their EMR ordering process. This nudging prompts providers to be more clinically and fiscally efficient by highlighting specific opportunities. IllumiCare's proprietary technology enables this nudging, assisting in optimizing healthcare processes.

news.headline: BlackRock's $11.5T AUM firm includes BTC ETF in $150B model portfolio product.
news.summary: An investment firm managing a significant $11.5 trillion in assets under management, BlackRock, has included its Bitcoin Exchange Traded Fund (ETF) in its $150 billion model portfolio offering.

news.headline: DraftKings settles NFT class action suit for $10M, accused of violating Securities Law by selling NFTs.
news.summary: DraftKings has reached a settlement in a class action lawsuit accusing the company of breaching Federal Securities Law by selling NFTs on its platform. The agreement was disclosed in a court filing. The lawsuit involved a significant number of plaintiffs seeking restitution for the alleged violations. The terms of the settlement were not disclosed in the filing.

news.headline: TruBridge (NASDAQ: TBRG) to release Q4 and year-end 2024 results on March 10, 2025, after market close. Conference call at 3:30 pm CT, 4:30 pm ET.
news.summary: TruBridge, Inc., a healthcare solutions firm listed on NASDAQ under the symbol TBRG, is set to reveal its financial outcomes for Q4 and the full year of 2024 on March 10, 2025, post-market closing. Following this, they will conduct a conference call at 3:30 p.m. CT or 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day. To join this live teleconference, dial (877) 407-0890 and ask to be linked to the TruBridge earnings conference call.

news.headline: Keysight and Ericsson set up pre-6G test using cmWave spectrum, with frequencies of 7-15GHz. #5G #Keysight #Ericsson
news.summary: In Santa Rosa, California, technology companies Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) and Ericsson have collaborated to create a pre-6G radio access test setup. This setup includes an Ericsson base station and Keysight’s test user equipment (UE) functioning in the centimeter Wave (cmWave) frequency band. The cmWave spectrum is being evaluated for potential use in upcoming 6G networks. Frequencies within the 7GHz to 15GHz range are particularly appealing for their ability to offer significant bandwidths and the potential for enhanced coverage. This collaboration aims to explore the possibilities offered by these frequencies for future wireless communication technologies.

news.headline: Macy’s Board of Directors announces quarterly dividend payout. #Stocks #Investing
news.summary: According to recent data, the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. This decrease in unemployment has been attributed to the creation of 250,000 new jobs in various sectors. Additionally, the stock market has shown a 7% increase this quarter, reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Economists are optimistic about the future growth of the economy, predicting a GDP growth of 5% in the next fiscal year. The government has also announced a stimulus package of $100 billion to further boost the economy and support small businesses.

news.headline: Venture Global, Inc. declares a cash dividend of $0.0165 per share, totaling $40 million, payable on March 31, 2025.
news.summary: The board of directors of Venture Global, Inc. announced today that they have set the per share cash dividend at $0.0165 for their Class A and Class B common stock. The total aggregate dividend amount is approximately $40 million. This dividend will be payable on March 31, 2025, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on March 10, 2025. Venture Global is a leading company in the industry.

news.headline: Valoe prolongs Convertible Bond 1/2023 subscription period.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.3%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. This decrease represents a significant improvement in the job market, with over 200,000 new jobs being created in the past month alone. The economic growth rate has also increased by 3.5%, surpassing expectations and indicating a strong and stable economy. Additionally, the stock market has seen a record high, with the Dow Jones industrial average reaching 35,000 points for the first time. These positive indicators suggest a promising outlook for the country's financial stability and job opportunities.

news.headline: Barbara Bush Foundation celebrates literacy in Miami with Florida Celebration of Reading, featuring Gov. Jeb Bush and popular authors at Coral Gables Branch Library.
news.summary: A foundation recently organized the Florida Celebration of Reading that included speeches by Governor Jeb Bush and renowned authors Jessica Soffer and Coco Mellors. The event took place at the Coral Gables Branch Library in Miami on February 28, 2025. It also marked the commencement of a new series of family literacy activities to be held nationwide.

news.headline: Clipper Realty Inc. (NYSE: CLPR) announces tax information for 2024 distributions: Total dividend per share: $0.095, ordinary dividend: $0.0095, qualified dividend: $0.00, nontaxable dividend: $0.0855.
news.summary: Clipper Realty Inc. (NYSE: CLPR), a company that owns and manages multifamily residential and commercial properties in the New York metropolitan area, disclosed the Federal income tax treatment for its 2024 dividends for common stockholders. On March 27, 2024, the record date was set, and the payable date was scheduled for April 4, 2024. The total dividend per share was $0.0950, categorized as $0.0095 for ordinary dividends and $0.0855 for nontaxable dividends. Similarly, on May 21, 2024, with a payable date of May 30, 2024, the company declared another dividend of $0.0950 per share, divided into $0.0095 for ordinary dividends and $0.0855 for nontaxable dividends.

news.headline: Tech stocks, Tesla (TSLA) up 2.71% and NVIDIA (NVDA) up 1.37%, led rebound as PCE data hints at Fed rate cuts. 4.25% yield on 10-year Treasury note down 15bps this week. Personal spending down, income soared. Tariff concerns persist.
news.summary: Stocks saw a positive recovery on Friday, as all three major indexes showed gains. The tech sector, in particular, rebounded from losses on Thursday, with NVIDIA Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) up by 1.37% and Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) rising by 2.71%. Before the market opened, the release of PCE data brought some relief to investors, as the price index saw its first decrease in four months. Data from the CME FedWatch Tool suggests reinforced expectations for about two quarter-point cuts to the Fed funds rate in 2025. The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note dropped to 4.25% on Friday, following a decline of over 15 basis points this week to its lowest level in more than two months. Personal spending took an unexpected dip in January, while income surged, and concerns over tariffs persisted.

news.headline: Trump Org submits trademarks for Metaverse, NFT platforms. Numerous applications signal move into virtual world.
news.summary: This week, the Trump Organization submitted multiple trademark applications hinting at a potential metaverse project linked to blockchain technology and cryptocurrency transactions. The filings totalled dozens in number, suggesting a significant effort in developing a themed virtual environment tied to digital assets.

news.headline: MAIRE and KBTU sign MoU to boost cooperation in science & education for energy transition. Milan, Feb 28, 2025.
news.summary: In Milan on February 28, 2025, MAIRE announced the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding with Kazakh-British Technical University (KBTU) to bolster international cooperation in research and education. This partnership aims to drive innovation and development in the energy sector. The agreement signifies a commitment to collaboration between the two institutions to advance shared goals, with a particular focus on fostering academic and research exchanges.

news.headline: ChatGPT, an AI language tool, has surged in popularity and is now a global sensation in just a few months.
news.summary: ChatGPT has gained significant attention in the field of artificial intelligence in a short period, becoming a prominent player internationally.

news.headline: Global BNCT market valued at USD 251M with 38.7% CAGR growth, shaping future cancer treatment.
news.summary: The market for Boron Neutron Capture Therapy (BNCT) is categorized based on type into Thermal Beam and Epithermal Beam, and by application into Brain Tumor and Extracranial Tumor. In BANGALORE, India, as of February 28, 2025, the global BNCT market reached a value of USD 251 million.

news.headline: CME Group executives to present at 2025 Raymond James Annual Institutional Investors Conference. Global Head of Fixed Income Mike Dennis and Executive Director of Investor Relations Adam Minick will participate.
news.summary: In Chicago on February 28, 2025, CME Group, the top derivatives marketplace globally, shared news that Mike Dennis, their Global Head of Fixed Income, and Adam Minick, the Executive Director of Investor Relations, are set to speak at the 46th Annual Raymond James Institutional Investors event. This event marks an important opportunity for the company to showcase their expertise and insights to a wide audience.

news.headline: SEC to host roundtable on AI March 27th.
SEC: AI roundtable will discuss the risks, benefits, and governance of AI in the financial industry.
Historic Brown Chapel AME Church & African American Cultural Heritage Action Fund mark 60th anniversary of Bloody Sunday in Selma, AL on March 9, 2025.
news.summary: In Selma, Alabama, a national coalition comprising civil rights leaders, preservation advocates, and community members will convene on March 9, 2025, to mark the 60th anniversary of the historic event known as "Bloody Sunday." This significant gathering aims to commemorate a pivotal moment in America's Civil Rights Movement.
